record.field: Flowise is an open-source visual builder for designing, testing, and deploying LLM applications and AI agents through a drag-and-drop canvas.

Flowise is an open-source visual builder for designing, testing, and deploying LLM applications and AI agents through a drag-and-drop canvas.

It sits between raw model APIs and your end-user applications, letting teams assemble chatbots, RAG pipelines, and multi-agent workflows by wiring nodes instead of writing boilerplate. Built on a Node.js backend and React frontend, it connects to 100+ LLM providers, vector databases, tools, and memory stores, and exposes everything you build as an API, SDK, CLI, or embeddable chat widget. It is aimed at developers and AI teams who want to prototype and ship agentic systems quickly without sacrificing customization.

Key features
  • Drag-and-drop canvas with three build modes: Assistant, Chatflow, and Agentflow for multi-agent orchestration
  • Integrations with 100+ models, vector stores, tools, and memory backends, plus custom code nodes
  • Advanced RAG techniques including graph RAG, rerankers, and retrievers
  • API, SDK, CLI access and embeddable chat widgets for any frontend
  • Execution logs, visual debugging, and monitoring of running flows
  • Enterprise controls: RBAC, SSO/SAML, encrypted credentials, rate limiting, and audit logs
Best for

Developers and AI teams building chatbots, RAG assistants, and agentic workflows who want fast visual prototyping with self-hosted, air-gapped deployment. Because of past critical RCE issues, run the latest release with authentication enabled and behind a reverse proxy with proper network controls.

services: redis: image: redis:alpine restart: always volumes: - ./redis_data:/data container_name: '{{ INSTANCE_CODE }}_redis' networks: - internal flowise: image: flowiseai/flowise:latest restart: always expose: - 3000 volumes: - ./flowise_data:/root/.flowise environment: PORT: 3000 DATABASE_PATH: /root/.flowise REDIS_URL: redis://redis:6379 JWT_AUTH_TOKEN_SECRET: {{ jwt_auth_token_secret }} JWT_REFRESH_TOKEN_SECRET: {{ jwt_refresh_token_secret }} EXPRESS_SESSION_SECRET: {{ express_session_secret }} healthcheck: test: - CMD - curl - -f - http://localhost:3000/api/v1/ping interval: 10s timeout: 5s retries: 5 start_period: 30s entrypoint: /bin/sh -c "sleep 3; flowise start" depends_on: - redis container_name: '{{ INSTANCE_CODE }}' ports: - '{{ PORT_HTTP }}:3000' networks: - internal - agz-proxy-network flowise-worker: image: flowiseai/flowise-worker:latest restart: always volumes: - ./flowise_data:/root/.flowise environment: WORKER_PORT: 5566 DATABASE_PATH: /root/.flowise REDIS_URL: redis://redis:6379 healthcheck: test: - CMD - curl - -f - http://localhost:5566/healthz interval: 10s timeout: 5s retries: 5 start_period: 30s entrypoint: /bin/sh -c "node /app/healthcheck/healthcheck.js & sleep 5 && pnpm run start-worker" depends_on: - redis - flowise container_name: '{{ INSTANCE_CODE }}_flowise_worker' networks: - internal networks: internal: driver: bridge agz-proxy-network: external: true
